web.title: OPUS Coconut Grove | Luxury Condos for Sale in Miami
web.description: Discover OPUS — 14 exclusive luxury condos for sale in Coconut Grove, Miami from $2.9M. Rooftop pool, spa, concierge & private terraces.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://opusgrove.com/#content)

# A NEW MASTERPIECE IN COCONUT GROVE

[Inquire Now](https://opusgrove.com/#contact)

![bg-logo](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/bg-logo.png)

## Opus

Experience a new level of quiet luxury at OPUS, a boutique residence in Coconut Grove. With 14 exquisitely designed units and unparalleled amenities, OPUS is an elevated alternative to larger condominiums, offering an exclusive, higher standard of living in Miami’s most coveted neighborhood.

[Request brochure](https://opusgrove.com/#contact)

## Starting At $2.9 MM

- 14 Residences, including 2 Penthouses
- 3-4 Bedrooms
- Starting at 1,900 Square Feet

[View Floor Plans](https://opusgrove.com/residences/)

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Opus-Intro-866x1024.webp)

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/OPUS-CoconutGrove-Inset-866x1024.webp)

Neighborhood

## Welcome   To The Grove

OPUS is located in close proximity to Michelin-starred restaurants, the urban village of Cocowalk, and bayside yacht clubs. Additionally, OPUS is near many top-rated schools, making it an ideal choice for families.

[Contact Our Sales Team](https://opusgrove.com/#contact)

Amenities

## Life is an Artform

Step away from the city and into a refuge of discreet luxury. From a resort-style rooftop pool and lounge to an innovative parking system, these curated amenities invite you to perfect the art of a life well-lived.

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/newoutdoor-1024x724.webp)

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/pool-1024x713.webp)

- Secluded Rooftop Pool, Bar, and Lounge
- Outdoor Kitchen with Gas BBQ Grills
- Rooftop Gym with Cardio and Weight Machines
- Signature Spa with Sauna, Steam, and Massage Rooms
- Business Lounge with Private Offices and Conference Room
- Up to 3 Assigned Parking Spaces per Residence
- Private Dedicated Wine Cellar
- 24-Hour Concierge Reception, Security, Valet Parking
- Children’s Playroom

[View Floor Plans](https://opusgrove.com/residences/)

![Opus-OurResidences-PrivateTour-IMG](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Opus-OurResidences-PrivateTour-IMG-866x1024.webp)

## Schedule An Appointment

Learn more about what makes OPUS unique by speaking with a member

of our sales team.

[Inquire now](https://opusgrove.com/#contact)

## Request More  Information

Submit an inquiry and a member of our sales team will contact you directly with our OPUS brochure and detailed fact sheet.

By submitting my information, I agree to be contacted by OPUS Coconut Grove via call, email, and text. To opt-out, you can reply 'stop' at any time or click the unsubscribe link in the emails. Message and data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy](https://opusgrove.com/privacy-policy/)Leave this field blankSUBMIT INQUIRY

## Visionaries

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/OPUS-Visionaries-Kobi-Inset-866x1024.webp)

## Kobi Karp   Architecture

For over two decades, Kobi Karp Architecture and Interior Design (KKAID) has been providing innovative design solutions to renowned clients internationally and domestically in hospitality, retail and luxury residential developments.

## João   Armentano

João Armentano is known for his versatile approach and collaborative projects. His work spans commercial, residential, and hospitality sectors, with notable projects including São Paulo’s Hotel Unique and the Hotel Carmel Taíba in Ceará.

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Opus-Visionaries-Joao-866x1024.webp)

### Exclusive Sales

![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/ca8bd885-187e-4448-aeaf-4f67738d1fd8.png)

The Nicolas Group is a full-service luxury real estate team serving Miami since 2017, helping clients buy, sell, lease, and explore private development opportunities, with a strong focus on advisory services that empower confident, informed decisions.

informed decisions and reach their real estate goals.

### Developer

[![](https://opusgrove.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/MTD_Logo_Caramel@4x-8-300x71.png)](https://metadevelopment.us/)

Meta Development specializes in crafting luxury residences that redefine the concept of upscale living. Our philosophy revolves around the unwavering pursuit of excellence, blending sophistication with sustainability and cutting-edge design.

web.markdown:
![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/menubarmrg_bg2.png)

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Banner-Opus-Coconut-Grove.jpg)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/logo-opus.png)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/01-Opus-Coconut-Grove-Building.jpg)

# OPUS Coconut Grove

### **2026**

6 Stories / 14 Residences of
3 & 4 Bedrooms

**3137 SW 27th Ave, Miami, FL 33133, USA**

With only 14 residences, OPUS Coconut Grove is a six story timelessly chic residential tower. Its design by Kobi Karp resulted in a blend of old-world charm and modern allure. Residents find in OPUS Residences Coconut Grove the most sophisticated way to enjoy their lives. Residence features include open floor plans, panoramic city, bay and Coconut Grove views, 12-foot ceilings with floor-to-ceiling windows, private terraces, Italian kitchen cabinetry, and more. All residences and common areas feature tranquil ambiance, luxury and the latest innovations at hand. Amenities include a rooftop pool, signature spa, sauna, steam and massage rooms, fitness center, HD security cameras, business lounge, and more. OPUS's convenient location in the Coconut Grove area offers supreme views spanning from Peacock Park across Biscayne Bay to Key Biscayne and beyond.

This property has units available for sale starting at $2,500,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/opuscoconutgrove/#contactform) for more information.

This property has units available for sale starting at $2,500,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/opuscoconutgrove/#contactform) for more information.

**Payment Plan**

20% at contract

10% at groundbreaking (est. Q1 2025)

10% at top-off (est. Q4 2025)

Remaining 60% at closing (est. Summer 2026)



## Features

### Building Features

- 24-Hour Concierge Reception, Valet and Security
- Secured Gated Parking
- HD Security Cameras Throughout Property
- Lush Tropical Landscaping
- Property Management
- Restricted Private Elevator Foyers
- Hi-Speed Internet
- Bike Storage Available
- Private Dedicated Storage Units Available
- Secluded Rooftop Pool, Bar and Lounge
- Covered Patio with Outdoor Kitchen including gas BBQ grill
- Rooftop Gym with Panoramic Views
- Signature Spa with Sauna, Steam and Massage Rooms
- Business Lounge with Private Rooms and Conference Room
- Private Dedicated Wine Cellars
- Dynamic Children’s Playroom

### Residence Features

- Spacious, Open Floor Plans Providing an Indoor-Outdoor Living Experience
- Panoramic City, Bay and Coconut Grove Views
- Light-Filled 12-Foot Ceilings with Full-Height Glass Windows and Doors
- Private Outdoor Terraces
- Stone & Quartz Countertops
- Custom Kitchens and Millwork featuring Italian Cabinetry
- Premium Natural Gas Miele and Sub-Zero Appliances
- Porcelain Tile Floors
- Solid Core Interior Wood Doors
- Pre-Wired for Hi-Speed Internet
- Pre-Wired for Smart Home Automation
- Energy Efficient Windows: Insulated, Laminated Tinted Low-E High-Efficiency Glass
- High-Efficiency Thermal Insulation for Roof and Walls
- Natural Daylighting and Tropical Sustainable Design
